case_title: AVISHY SCHMIDT` VS. SOPHIE LAU et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SEVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SCHMIDT, AVISHY AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING GRANTED. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES BY DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LAU, SOPHIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SCHMIDT, AVISHY (THE JUDGMENT ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM INCLUDES A CREDIT TO DEFENDANT AND CROSS COMPLAINANT, FOR THE REST OF DECEMBER 5, 2008.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED NOV-10-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED NOV-10-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED JAN-14-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SCHMIDT, AVISHY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHMIDT, AVISHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP $1,520.32 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,595.32, (PLAINTIFF MAY CASH THE $400.00 MONEY ORDER PREVIOUSLY TENDERED BY DEFENDANT, AND DEFENDANT SHALL THEN RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT FOR THAT PAYMENT.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SCHMIDT, AVISHY ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-22-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SCHMIDT, AVISHY RECOVER FROM APPELLANT LAU, SOPHIE $400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00, *NET AWARD APPLIES TO TO COMPLAINT AND CROSS-COMPLAINT. (RESPONDENT SHALL RETAIN $400.00 MONEY ORDER PAID BY APPELLANT FOR OCTOBER PARKING AND REFUND OF ADMINISTRATIVE FEE AND CASH MONEY ORDER. APPELLANT SHALL RETAIN $4,370.00 DEPOSIT FOR RENT FOR THE MONTHS OF NOVEMBER AND DECEMBER, 2007.) NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:40AM
Judge Pro Tem Jeffery Ross, Nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, Sophie Lau, present with counsel Samer Danfoura; Respondent, Avishy Schmidt, appears in Pro Per. Case involves a cross-complaint that will be addressed.
Avishy Schmidt, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative.
EXHA(A) Declaration
EXHA(B) A list of chronological events
11:02AM
Matter is submitted. Newly marked evidence for Appellant is retained; plaintiff's evidence envelope returned to file.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
